title: FIFA 2026 bracket predictor – see live crowd % as picks come in
abstract:
Built this on top of a side project (quizzy.earth).

The interesting engineering problem was the best-thirds seating logic – FIFA pre-publishes a 495-row lookup table (Annexe C) covering every possible combination of third-place qualifiers. AI kept hallucinating bracket rules so I ended up readi
abstract_zh: 这是一款预测2026年世界杯分组的神器，你看直播时 crowd % 就能实时更新，就像是球场上的欢呼声直接塞进了你的手机！工程难题在于“最佳三分之一入座逻辑”，FIFA 发布了一个惊人的 495 行预览表（Annexe C），AI 竟还幻想着分组规则，我这就成了它的临时调试员。快来试试，让你的预测比场上的欢呼声还要抢先一步！
